content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: e1e4498b-b9c
Subtask ID: 9acc63ea
Priority: 2

Task: Create a complete Python implementation of a singly linked list with the following requirements:

1. Node class with data and next pointer
2. LinkedList class with these methods:
   - insert_at_head(data) - Insert at beginning
   - insert_at_tail(data) - Insert at end
   - insert_at_position(data, position) - Insert at specific index
   - delete_by_value(data) - Remove first node with matching value, return True if found/removed, False otherwise
   - delete_at_position(position) - Remove node at index, return the data or raise IndexError if out of bounds
   - delete_head() - Remove first node
   - delete_tail() - Remove last node
   - display() - Print the list
   - size() - Return number of nodes
   - is_empty() - Return True if list is empty
   - search(data) - Return True if value exists in list

Include proper error handling for edge cases (empty list operations, out of bounds indices, value not found). Add docstrings and type hints. Include a __main__ block with test cases demonstrating all methods work correctly.
